name: Homemade Chocolate Syrup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine cocoa powder, sugar and salt (if using).
2. Gradually stir in boiling water.
3. Stir frequently over medium heat until smooth and slightly thickened, about 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla extract.
5. Pour mixture into a 3-cup container with a tight fitting lid. Label with date and contents.
6. Store in refrigerator. Use within 10-12 weeks.
7. Makes about 2 2/3 cups Homemade Chocolate Syrup Mix.
